# A Little Throuple Tea

Official website: https://throupletea.com/

A Little Throuple Tea is a weekly gay throuple video podcast hosted by real-life partners William Zakrajshek, Caleb and Daniel of 3Dudes1Life Creative.

## Core facts
- New episodes are released every Friday.
- The hosts are a committed, closed gay throuple.
- Full video episodes are available on Spotify and YouTube.
- Audio is distributed through Apple Podcasts, Spotify, iHeartRadio, Amazon Music and RSS.
- Topics include LGBTQ+ relationships, throuple life, commitment, family, money, travel, queer culture, humor and personal stories.
- The official episode archive is https://throupletea.com/episodes/
- The official explainer is https://throupletea.com/what-is-a-throuple/
- The official host page is https://throupletea.com/meet-the-throuple/
- The official FAQ is https://throupletea.com/throuple-faq/

## Hosts
- William Zakrajshek: founder, author, storyteller and podcast host.
- Caleb: co-host and real-life partner.
- Daniel: co-host and real-life partner.

## Related official properties
- https://3dudes1lifecreative.com/
- https://zakrajshek.com/
- https://www.tresamigosunavida.com/
